title: ISSS626
text:
Welcome to ISSS626 Geospatial Analytics and Application. This website collects my course work and hands-on exercises. Use the top navigation bar to open each page.






How to use this site




Home (this page): overview, quick links, and status.
About: short profile and tools used.
Hand-on Exercise (menu): open individual assignments.






👉 Hand-on Exercise 1: Open the assignment

👉 About: Course and tooling





Demonstrate step-by-step workflows for geospatial tasks that a beginner can follow.
Use clear, descriptive names and relative file paths so the website renders correctly on Netlify.
Provide reproducible results with the same structure for every assignment.





Code with explanations for beginners
Every code block includes plain-language comments. No unexplained acronyms are used.
Outputs
Static maps, tables, and charts are embedded in the assignment pages.
